title: Jasmine Rice Bowl with Soy Sauce Glaze
description: A simple and flavorful dish with the subtle taste of jasmine rice and a savory soy sauce glaze.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of jasmine rice and stir to coat with oil.
Add 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until water is absorbed.
In a small bowl, whisk together 2 tablespoons of soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Once rice is cooked, pour soy sauce glaze over the top and fluff with a fork.
